markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, PSEO progress, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** The "bias to publication" initiative is moving drafts to staging, with 4 articles ready this week. The podcast content pipeline is also strong, offering unique, authoritative perspectives.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**PSEO MVP Staged:** The desktop version of the PSEO calibration page is live in Framer, unblocking content population. SME feedback on the initial pages and sitemap is due this week to refine the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**New PSEO & Content Focus:** The next PSEO project is proposed: location-based insurance pages for the US market. The team will also revisit the high-value "Underwriting Workbench" content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Dashboard Reset:** A February 20th prompt change reset the AI visibility dashboard, creating a new baseline for measurement. The team will review prompts to ensure they align with key sales questions.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Strategy

  - [**Podcast Article Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [The pipeline is strong, delivering content with unique points of view that only Hyperexponential could write.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
      - [**Action:** Publish all drafts to test audience interest and keyword traction.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**"Bias to Publication" Initiative:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
      - [This initiative encourages publishing "good enough" content to accelerate the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Publishing now is more efficient than sending content back for lengthy redrafts.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Comparison Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [These articles are high-impact for citations and AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [**Action:** Set an Airtable automation to review/update these articles more frequently, especially for product mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Programmatic SEO (PSEO)

  - [**Calibration Page MVP:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [The desktop page is staged in Framer, ready for content population.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Action:** Franki to review the live page and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**SME Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Daniel Radigan (SME) will provide detailed feedback on the first two pages and the sitemap by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**Framing for SME:** The goal is to build authority for search and AI, not to create exhaustive white papers.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Dev Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX dev team to create a Loom video or documentation detailing the Framer build process, including challenges and trade-offs.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This will serve as a brief for the freelancer/agency handling mobile responsiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Next PSEO Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Location-based insurance pages targeting the US market.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Builds US-specific authority and reuses the existing PSEO template.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [**Validated Keywords:** Commercial Insurance, Workers Comp, Commercial Auto (state-by-state).](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### Underwriting Workbench Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Capture high-value organic and AI visibility for core "Underwriting Workbench" keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - **Rationale:** A competitor currently ranks \#2 for "underwriting intelligence," showing a clear opportunity to improve.
  - [**Action:** GrowthX to provide a Notion summary of the previous "Underwriting Workbench" strategy (currently in Airtable).](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [**Scope:** GrowthX will focus on the SEO/AI-driven content, while Hyperexponential handles thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

### AI Visibility & Reporting

  - [**Dashboard Access:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [Franki has access; Deyan is blocked by a passkey error.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey to resend the invite to Deyan, which was the fix for Franki.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [**Prompt Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Action:** Franki to review the current prompt list (to be provided as a CSV) to identify gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensure prompts align with key sales questions (e.g., from Gong recordings) and product features.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [**Dashboard Reset:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [The dashboard shows a drop on Feb 20th due to a prompt change. This creates a new baseline for measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
      - [The tracking issue is now fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Stage 4 new articles this week.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
      - [Provide a Notion summary of the "Underwriting Workbench" strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [Send the PSEO location-based page proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [Send the AI visibility prompt list as a CSV.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [Resend the AI visibility invite to Deyan.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
      - [Request a Framer build-process overview from the dev team.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [**Hyperexponential:**](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Review the PSEO calibration page MVP and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [Share SME feedback on calibration pages and the sitemap by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [Review the AI visibility prompt list for gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
      - [Share the "Underwriting Intelligence" campaign overview doc.](https://fathom.video/share/siW1GYp-TP8o83u2tP-evJTs2E8YZRxk?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
